endpoints.name: GET /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: POST /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: GET /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}
endpoints.description: Gets information about a single replica pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: POST /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: GET /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}/replicas
endpoints.description: Lists all replicas in a pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: GET /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}/replicas/{replicaName}
endpoints.description: Gets information about a specific replica.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: POST /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}/replicas/{replicaName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a replica from the pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: POST /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}/replicas/{replicaName}/restart
endpoints.description: Restarts a replica in a pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: POST /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}/resize
endpoints.description: Resize a pool. This is an asynchronous operation, and multiple overlapping resize requests can be made. Replica Pools will use the information from the last resize request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.

endpoints.name: POST /{projectName}/zones/{zone}/pools/{poolName}/updateTemplate
endpoints.description: Update the template used by the pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{ZONE}} with a real zone.
